prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford 109E inline-4 (original engine code) with a fully balanced and blueprinted short block, featuring forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 compression), steel connecting rods, and a nitrided crankshaft for high-RPM reliability up to 7,500 RPM

Custom-built Jenvey ITB (Individual Throttle Body) kit with 42mm throttle plates, paired with a custom 4-into-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed Engineering, terminating in a 2.5-inch stainless steel exhaust with a MagnaFlow 14815 race muffler for optimized scavenging

Full-race camshafts by Kent Cams (Part No. 248/252 duration, 0.400" lift) with adjustable vernier pulleys, paired with a Schrick 1.8:1 ratio roller rocker setup and a custom-mapped Lucas 10-degree ignition advance curve for aggressive mid-to-high RPM power delivery
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using hand-formed aluminum panels by Williams & Pritchard, extending the rear fenders by 3 inches to accommodate 15x8 Panasport 505 wheels with 205/50R15 Yokohama A052 semi-slick tires

Full bespoke interior retrim by Royal Steering Wheels, featuring a 14-inch Moto-Lita suede steering wheel, Recaro SRD bucket seats with 4-point Schroth harnesses, and a full aluminum dashboard with Smiths gauges (3.25" tachometer, oil pressure, water temp, and fuel level)

Custom aero package by Specialised Mouldings, including a front splitter with integrated brake ducts, a rear ducktail spoiler in carbon fiber, and a side-exit exhaust cutout with polished stainless steel trim for a period-correct yet aggressive stance
